title: zanthoxylum holtzianum
intro: Zanthoxylum holtzianum, also known as the Bintulu prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to Borneo. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum holtzianum include its ability to alleviate pain and reduce inflammation, as well as its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or tincture, which can be used to treat various ailments, including fever and digestive issues.
